invariant: CLAUDE.md: all scroll/animation orchestration lives in a single shared runtime per surface; no per-section useEffect. Lab* components emit data-* attributes only; the page-level runtime consumes them.

runtimes.name: ScrollFX
runtimes.scope: every internal page + section-lab + LegalDoc + all sections/lab/Lab*
runtimes.reduced_motion: reveals -> is-in immediately; pins -> --pin:1 + steps active; scrubs -> --scrub:1; scrub-videos seek to end
runtimes.page_level_or_section_level: page-level (one instance per page); also lifts body hero-ready lock
runtimes.intended_use: the generic, prop-driven motion contract Lab* sections rely on

runtimes.name: ScrollOrchestrator
runtimes.runtime: bespoke class/selector + dataset driven; many independent rAF loops/tweens

data_attributes.note: NOT a generic data-* contract; targets specific home selectors (.hero-splash, .scrub-stage, .wf-rail .step, .sd-rail .step, .deckfield, data-d=...)

restrictions: do not reuse for internal pages; use ScrollFX
